title: AN ACT CREATING FOUR ADDITIONAL POSITIONS OF ASSISTANT PROVINCIAL FISCAL FOR THE PROVINCE OF OCCIDENTAL MISAMIS, AMENDÂ­ING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION SIXTEEN HUNDRED SEVENTY-FOUR OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE CODE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 11858 / 65 OG No. 23, 5822 (June 9, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5286, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT CREATING FOUR ADDITIONAL POSITIONS OF ASSISTANT PROVINCIAL FISCAL FOR THE PROVINCE OF OCCIDENTAL MISAMIS, AMENDÂING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION SIXTEEN HUNDRED SEVENTY-FOUR OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE CODE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The provision of Section sixteen hundred fifty-four of the Administrative Code, as amended, relative to the number of assistant provincial fiscals in the Province of Occidental Misamis, is further amended to as follows:

" Occidental Misamis, six assistant provincial fiscals;"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
